title: Move user to other datacenter
excerpt:
my ISP (HKT / PCCW) having problem to connect to CDN7.Monday.com and they don’t fix it. 
would it possible move user to other datacenter to avoid the problem?

posts.author: hardwood.sysmon (Hardwood SysMon)
posts.cookedHtml:
my ISP (HKT / PCCW) having problem to connect to CDN7.Monday.com and they don’t fix it.
would it possible move user to other datacenter to avoid the problem?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @hardwood.sysmon, thanks for posting about this! Can you write into support@monday.com? Then we can take a closer look at your account and get this figured out.
